chapter_title: Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Sign” means an outdoor sign, display, light, device, figure, painting, drawing, message, plaque, poster, or other thing designed, intended, or used to advertise or inform.

(2) “State highway right-of-way” means the right-of-way of a highway designated as part of the state highway system.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 392. Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
##### § 392.031 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Sign” means an outdoor sign, display, light, device, figure, painting, drawing, message, plaque, poster, or other thing designed, intended, or used to advertise or inform.

    (2) “State highway right-of-way” means the right-of-way of a highway designated as part of the state highway system.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: “Sign” means an outdoor sign, display, light, device, figure, painting, drawing, message, plaque, poster, or other thing designed, intended, or used to advertise or inform.
“State highway right-of-way” means the right-of-way of a highway designated as part of the state highway system.
